add-semi-transparent-logo-stamp.title: Add Semi-Transparent Logo Stamp to PDF Page
add-semi-transparent-logo-stamp.description: Creates a sample PDF and adds a semi‑transparent logo image stamp to its first page.

add-image-stamp.title: Add Image Stamp with Quality and Opacity to PDF Page
add-image-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp with 100% quality and 0.8 opacity to the second page of a PDF document.

add-image-stamp-alt-text.title: Add Image Stamp with Alternative Text on Page 3
add-image-stamp-alt-text.description: Creates a PDF with three pages, adds an image stamp on the third page and sets alternative text for accessibility.

image-background-floatingbox.title: Add Image Background to FloatingBox on Page Four
image-background-floatingbox.description: Demonstrates how to place an image as the background of a FloatingBox on the fourth page of a PDF.

apply-image-stamp-all-pages.title: Apply Image Stamp to All PDF Pages
apply-image-stamp-all-pages.description: Creates a sample PDF, generates a small PNG image, and applies that image as a stamp to every page using a foreach loop.

rotate-image-stamp.title: Rotate Image Stamp and Add to PDF Page
rotate-image-stamp.description: Creates a PDF, generates an image, rotates the image stamp by 45 degrees, and adds it to the first page.

add-image-stamp-top-right.title: Add Image Stamp Aligned Top-Right with Margins
add-image-stamp-top-right.description: Creates a PDF and adds an image stamp positioned at the top‑right corner with specified margin offsets.

scale-image-stamp-full-width.title: Scale Image Stamp to Full Page Width Preserving Aspect Ratio
scale-image-stamp-full-width.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp that spans the full width of a PDF page while keeping its original aspect ratio.

add-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.title: Add Image Stamp from Memory Stream to PDF
add-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates how to create an image stamp from a memory stream and apply it to a PDF page.

add-low-quality-image-stamp.title: Add Low‑Quality Image Stamp to PDF
add-low-quality-image-stamp.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, then adding an image stamp with 10% quality to improve performance on large documents.

add-opaque-image-stamp.title: Add Fully Opaque Image Stamp as Watermark
add-opaque-image-stamp.description: Creates a sample PDF and adds a fully opaque image stamp to each page as a visual watermark.

add-diagonal-image-watermark.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF
add-diagonal-image-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp rotated 90 degrees as a diagonal watermark to each page of a PDF.

add-upside-down-image-stamp.title: Add Upside-Down Image Stamp to PDF Page
add-upside-down-image-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp rotated 180 degrees (upside‑down) to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-custom-position.title: Add Image Stamp with Custom Position
add-image-stamp-custom-position.description: Creates a PDF, then adds an image stamp at specified X and Y coordinates on the first page.

image-stamp-percentage-offset.title: Add Image Stamp with Percentage Offsets
image-stamp-percentage-offset.description: Demonstrates positioning an image stamp on a PDF page using offsets expressed as percentages of the page size.

fixed-size-image-stamp.title: Add Fixed-Size Image Stamp to PDF Pages
fixed-size-image-stamp.description: Creates a sample PDF and adds an image stamp with fixed width and height to each page, independent of page dimensions.

add-image-stamp-alternative-text.title: Add Image Stamp with Unicode Alternative Text
add-image-stamp-alternative-text.description: Creates a PDF, adds an image stamp and sets multilingual alternative text for accessibility.

add-image-stamp-pdfa1b.title: Add Image Stamp with Alternative Text for PDF/A‑1b Output
add-image-stamp-pdfa1b.description: Creates a PDF, adds an image stamp with alternative text, and saves the document as PDF/A‑1b compliant PDF.

add-image-stamp-encrypted-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp to Encrypted PDF
add-image-stamp-encrypted-pdf.description: Creates a PDF, encrypts it with a password, then opens it using the password and adds an image stamp to each page.

add-image-stamp-signed-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp to Signed PDF without Invalidating Signature
add-image-stamp-signed-pdf.description: Creates a PDF, digitally signs it, then adds an image stamp using incremental update so the existing signature remains valid.

add-image-stamp-annotation.title: Add Image Stamp Annotation to PDF while Preserving Existing Annotations
add-image-stamp-annotation.description: Creates a PDF, adds a text annotation, then adds an image stamp annotation, demonstrating how to preserve existing annotations.

add-image-stamp-form.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF with Form Fields
add-image-stamp-form.description: Creates a PDF containing a form field and then adds an image stamp while preserving the field's functionality.

add-image-stamp-flatten.title: Add Image Stamp and Flatten Annotations to PDF
add-image-stamp-flatten.description: Creates a PDF, adds an image stamp as an annotation, then flattens the annotation to make the document read‑only.

add-image-stamp-preserve-bookmarks.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving Bookmarks
add-image-stamp-preserve-bookmarks.description: Creates a PDF with bookmarks, then adds an image stamp to each page without affecting the existing outline.

add-image-stamp-preserve-page-labels.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving Page Labels
add-image-stamp-preserve-page-labels.description: Creates a PDF, adds a page label, then applies an image stamp to the page without altering the existing page labels.

add-image-stamp-xmp.title: Add Image Stamp and Preserve XMP Metadata
add-image-stamp-xmp.description: Creates a PDF, adds custom XMP metadata, stamps an image on each page, and saves the result while keeping the metadata.

add-image-stamp-preserve-embedded.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving Embedded Files
add-image-stamp-preserve-embedded.description: Creates a PDF with an embedded file, then adds an image stamp to each page, ensuring the embedded file remains in the resulting document.

add-image-stamp-keep-javascript.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving JavaScript Actions
add-image-stamp-keep-javascript.description: Creates a PDF with a JavaScript action, adds an image stamp to each page, and saves the result, demonstrating that JavaScript actions remain intact.

add-image-stamp-preserve-acroform.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving AcroForm Fields
add-image-stamp-preserve-acroform.description: Creates a PDF with a form field, adds an image stamp to the page, and saves the result while keeping the form field intact.

add-text-stamp.title: Add Text Stamp with Custom Font, Size, and Color
add-text-stamp.description: Creates a PDF, then adds a blue text stamp with a custom font and size to the first page.

add-text-stamp-auto-adjust.title: Add Text Stamp with Auto-Adjusted Font Size
add-text-stamp-auto-adjust.description: Demonstrates adding a text stamp to a PDF page where the font size automatically adjusts to fit the defined stamp rectangle.

add-outlined-text-stamp.title: Add Outlined Text Stamp to PDF
add-outlined-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a text stamp with stroke rendering mode (outlined text) to a PDF page using Aspose.PDF for .NET.

fit-image-stamp-rectangle.title: Fit Image Stamp Within Rectangle on PDF Page
fit-image-stamp-rectangle.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp inside a defined rectangle on a PDF page, automatically adjusting its size and position.

add-text-stamp-fill-stroke.title: Add Text Stamp with Fill‑Stroke Rendering
add-text-stamp-fill-stroke.description: Demonstrates how to add a text stamp with fill‑stroke rendering to create bold outlined text in a PDF.

add-bottom-left-text-stamp.title: Add Bottom-Left Text Stamp with Margin
add-bottom-left-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a text stamp aligned to the bottom‑left corner of each page with a 10‑point margin.

rotate-text-stamp.title: Rotate Text Stamp for Slanted Watermark
rotate-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a text stamp rotated by 30 degrees to create a slanted watermark on a PDF.

add-confidential-text-stamp.title: Add Subtle Confidential Text Stamp to PDF
add-confidential-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a semi‑transparent "Confidential" text stamp with 0.6 opacity, and save the result.

add-text-stamp-background.title: Add Text Stamp with Background Box
add-text-stamp-background.description: Demonstrates how to add a text stamp with a colored background box to improve readability on a PDF page.

add-multi-line-text-stamp.title: Add Multi-Line Text Stamp with Custom Line Spacing
add-multi-line-text-stamp.description: Shows how to add a text stamp containing several lines with extra spacing to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rtl-text-stamp.title: Add Right-to-Left Text Stamp to PDF
add-rtl-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a right‑to‑left language text stamp (Arabic) to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-full-page-watermark.title: Add Full-Page Watermark Using PdfPageStamp
add-full-page-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to create a watermark that covers the entire page by using a PdfPageStamp as a background stamp.

add-diagonal-watermark.title: Add Diagonal Watermark Stamp to PDF Pages
add-diagonal-watermark.description: Creates a sample PDF and adds a diagonal text watermark rotated 45 degrees on each page.

add-page-stamp-background.title: Add Page Stamp as Background to PDF
add-page-stamp-background.description: Demonstrates how to add a page stamp behind the content of a PDF page using the Background property.

add-faint-page-stamp.title: Add Faint Text Stamp to All PDF Pages
add-faint-page-stamp.description: Creates a sample PDF and adds a semi‑transparent text stamp to each page.

add-rotated-page-stamp.title: Add Rotated Page Stamp to PDF
add-rotated-page-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a PDF page as a stamp rotated 90 degrees to match portrait to landscape orientation.

add-custom-page-stamp.title: Add Custom Sized Page Stamp to PDF
add-custom-page-stamp.description: Shows how to create a PDF page stamp with specific width, height, and position, and apply it to a target page.

add-page-stamp-range.title: Add Page Stamp to Specific Page Range
add-page-stamp-range.description: Demonstrates adding a page number stamp to pages 5 through 10 of a PDF using a loop.

add-text-stamp-all-pages.title: Add Text Stamp to All Pages
add-text-stamp-all-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a text stamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-page-stamp.title: Create PDF Page Stamp from Existing Page
create-pdf-page-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a stamp using a page from an existing PDF and apply it to another PDF.

pdf-page-background-stamp.title: Use PDF Page as Background Stamp
pdf-page-background-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to stamp a page from another PDF as a background on each page of a document.
